channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham to launch byelection campaign as Green candidate quits after just nine hours – UK politics live
item.description: Burnham to launch byelection campaign as Green candidate quits after just nine hours – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham latest: Manchester mayor to launch Makerfield by-election campaign as Starmer vows to back him
item.description: Andy Burnham latest: Manchester mayor to launch Makerfield by-election campaign as Starmer vows to back him

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Starmer bans Labour councillors from doing deals with Polanski’s Green Party
item.description: Starmer bans Labour councillors from doing deals with Polanski’s Green Party

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I’m really excited about this series: @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social will be drawing on her experience reporting on Greater Manchester, its policies and politics, to explain in great detail what makes Andy Burnham tick, e...
item.description: I’m really excited about this series: @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social will be drawing on her experience reporting on Greater Manchester, its policies and politics, to explain in great detail what makes Andy Burnham tick, e...

item.title: Byline Times: 'This EHRC Code Will Make the UK a Hostile Environment for Trans People'

item.title: The Guardian: Andy Burnham’s Manchester has a defining spirit – and Britain could do with a lot more of it | John Harris - The Guardian

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham bounce not enough to put Labour in power - The Telegraph
